# Big Planners - Travel Agency

> The official website of Big Planners, a travel agency that designs custom trips, national and international holiday packages, and travel advisor services.

## Site Structure and Navigation

This is a Single Page Application (SPA). Users and AI agents can navigate the page using the main header links:

- **Hero / Header**: Features beautiful sliding images of travel destinations and a main button to explore travel packages.
- **Testimonials**: Reviews from customers who have traveled with us.
- **Packages**: Interactive cards showing popular trips (Cancún, Europe, Japan, Peru). Clicking a card opens a modal with more details.
- **Benefits**: Key reasons to trust our agency and our credentials.
- **FAQ**: An accordion section with answers to common questions about bookings, payments, and services.
- **Contact**: Address details in Mérida, Yucatán, and links to social media accounts.

## AI Agent Interactions and Tools

### Package Quotation (Modal Windows)
In the `#packages` section, every travel card has a button called "View Details" or "Cotizar" (Quote).
- When clicked, a modal window opens with:
  - Trip duration (e.g., 5 days)
  - Starting price
  - What is included (flights, hotel, tours, transfers, etc.)
  - A button to request a quote via WhatsApp.

### Contact and Booking Links
- **Direct WhatsApp link**: The main way to contact us is a WhatsApp button. It opens `https://wa.me/5215512345678` with a pre-filled text (e.g., *"Hello Big Planners, I want a quote for the Cancun package"*).
- **Floating WhatsApp button**: Always available in the bottom-right corner of the screen for quick messaging.

## Social Media and Legal Info
- **Facebook**: [Official Facebook Page](https://www.facebook.com/Bigplannersmid)
- **Instagram**: [Official Instagram Page](https://www.instagram.com/bigplannersmid/)
- **Privacy Policy**: Link is located in the footer.
- **Terms of Service**: Link is located in the footer.
